name: Drink Water
goal: Drink 8 glasses of water every day
description: A daily habit to improve hydration and overall health.

name: Morning Run
description: Build cardiovascular endurance by running each morning before breakfast.

description: Read a non-fiction book to continuously grow knowledge and vocabulary.

description: Prepare portioned, healthy meals for the week to avoid unhealthy eating.
